name: sidecar
description: AI SDK sidecar for Mind Flayer

scripts.dev: npm run clean:binaries && NODE_ENV=development tsup && bash scripts/rename-binaries.sh
scripts.build: npm run clean:binaries && NODE_ENV=production tsup && PKG_CACHE_PATH="${PKG_CACHE_PATH:-${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/mind-flayer-pkg-cache}" pkg dist/index.js -t node24-macos-arm64 -o ../src-tauri/binaries/mind-flayer-sidecar-aarch64-apple-darwin
